heading: Private Link
body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for Private Link connections at either an hourly
or monthly rate. These rates vary by region.

| Region          | Hourly Price | Monthly Price |
| --------------- | ------------ | ------------- |
| asia-southeast1 | $0.0864      | $63.04        |
| europe-west1    | $0.0771      | $56.27        |
| europe-west2    | $0.0798      | $58.25        |
| europe-west3    | $0.0826      | $60.30        |
| europe-west4    | $0.0735      | $53.65        |
| us-central1     | $0.0700      | $51.10        |
| us-east1        | $0.0700      | $51.10        |
| us-east4        | $0.0700      | $51.10        |
| us-east7        | $0.0700      | $51.10        |
| us-west1        | $0.0700      | $51.10        |
